content.text:
Excellent! I now have a comprehensive understanding of the project. Let me provide you with a complete overview.

---

## COMPREHENSIVE PROJECT OVERVIEW: lol (Raycast UI Clone)

### PROJECT FACTS
- **Runtime**: Bun (package manager)
- **Language**: TypeScript (strict mode)
- **Framework**: React 19
- **Build Tool**: Vite 6
- **Styling**: Sass (no CSS modules, no styled-components, no tailwind)
- **Design**: Pixel-by-pixel Raycast interface clone

### 1. PACKAGE.JSON DEPENDENCIES

**Version**: 0.1.0 | **Package Manager**: Bun 1.3.6 | **Node**: >=20.0.0

**Runtime Dependencies** (3):
- `react@^19.2.4`
- `react-dom@^19.2.4`
- `dompurify@^3.3.1`
- `marked@^17.0.3` (markdown parser for detail views)

**Dev Dependencies** (25+):
- **Build/Bundling**: `vite@^7.3.1`, `@vitejs/plugin-react@^5.1.4`
- **Testing**: `vitest@^4.0.18`, `@vitest/coverage-v8@^4.0.18`, `jsdom@^28.1.0`, `@testing-library/react@^16.3.2`, `@testing-library/jest-dom@^6.9.1`, `@testing-library/user-event@^14.6.1`
- **Type Checking**: `typescript@^5.9.3`, `@types/react@^19.2.14`, `@types/react-dom@^19.2.3`, `@types/node@^25.0.3`, `@types/bun@latest`, `@types/jsdom@^28.0.0`, `@types/dompurify@^3.2.0`
- **Linting/Formatting**: `eslint@^10.0.2`, `@eslint/js@^10.0.1`, `typescript-eslint@^8.56.1`, `eslint-plugin-react-hooks@^7.0.1`, `eslint-plugin-react-refresh@^0.5.2`, `prettier@^3.7.4`, `prettier-plugin-organize-imports@^4.3.0`, `@belt/prettier-plugin@latest`
- **Styling**: `sass@^1.97.3`
- **Utilities**: `npm-run-all@^4.1.5`

**Scripts**:
```json
{
  "build": "vite build",
  "dev": "vite",
  "test": "vitest run --passWithNoTests",
  "test:watch": "vitest --watch --passWithNoTests",
  "coverage": "vitest --coverage",
  "check": "run-s check:*",
  "check:types": "tsc --noEmit",
  "check:lint": "eslint src --fix",
  "check:format": "prettier --write ."
}
```

---

### 2. VITE.CONFIG.TS
- React plugin enabled
- **Path alias**: `@` → `./src`
- **SCSS**: Modern compiler API
- **Test environment**: jsdom with globals enabled
- **Setup files**: `./src/test_setup.ts`

---

### 3. INDEX.HTML
- **Meta tags**: charset UTF-8, viewport responsive
- **Font**: Inter (400, 500, 600) from Google Fonts
- **Theme persistence script**: Checks localStorage for `raycast-theme` (light/dark/system)
- **Entry point**: `<div id="root">` with module script `src/main.tsx`

---

### 4. APP.TSX
**Size**: 993 lines | **Type**: Root component with full application logic

**Key Responsibilities**:
- State management: query, filterValue, selectedIndex, actionsOpen, quickLookOpen
- Navigation stack with breadcrumbs
- Favorites system integration
- Calculator evaluation
- Keyboard shortcuts (⌘K for actions, ⌘F for favorites, ⌘Y for quick look, space for quick look)
- Search/filter logic with command registry
- Detail view rendering with metadata
- Toast, HUD, and Alert management
- Layout switching (root → detail → command full view)

**Key Hooks Used**:
- `useTheme()`, `useToast()`, `useHUD()`, `useAlert()`, `useNavigationStack()`, `useFavorites()`, `useKeyboardShortcut()`

---

### 5. TYPES.TS
Core data structures for the application:

```typescript
// List components
export interface ListItemData {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  icon?: ReactNode;
  accessories?: ListItemAccessoryData[];
  detail?: ListItemDetailData;
}

export interface ListItemAccessoryData {
  text?: string;
  icon?: ReactNode;
  date?: Date;
  tag?: { text: string; color?: TagColor };
  tooltip?: string;
}

export interface ListItemDetailData {
  markdown: string;
  metadata?: ListItemMetadataEntry[];
}

// Metadata entries can be: label, link, tag-list, separator

export interface SectionData {
  title: string;
  items: ListItemData[];
}

// Grid components
export interface GridItemData {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  icon?: ReactNode;
}

export interface ColorItemData extends GridItemData {
  color: string;
  category: ColorCategory; // 'warm' | 'cool' | 'neutral'
}
```

---

### 6. REGISTRY SYSTEM

**Location**: `/src/registry/`

**Registry Files** (4):
1. **command_registry.ts** - Core registry management
   - `registerCommand(cmd)` - Register a new command
   - `getCommand(id)` - Retrieve command by ID
   - `getSections()` - Get all commands grouped by section
   - `searchCommands(query)` - Search by title, subtitle, keywords, aliases

2. **types.ts** - CommandRegistration interface
   ```typescript
   interface CommandRegistration {
     id: string;
     name: string;
     subtitle?: string;
     icon: ReactNode;
     keywords?: string[];
     aliases?: string[];
     section: string;
     accessories?: ListItemAccessoryData[];
     detail?: ListItemDetailData;
     component?: ComponentType;
     fullView?: boolean;
   }
   ```

3. **commands.ts** - 17 registered commands
   - **Suggestions** section (4): Clipboard History, Search Snippets, File Search, Search Emoji & Symbols
   - **Commands** section (6): Window Management, Calculator, Define Word, System Monitor, Color Picker, Raycast Settings
   - **Applications** section (7): Safari, Visual Studio Code, Terminal, Figma, Slack

4. **index.ts** - Exports registry API

---

### 7. COMPONENTS DIRECTORY
**Total**: 24 subdirectories | 88 component files (53 TSX + 35 supporting)

#### **Core UI Components**:
- **action_panel/** (3 files) - Bottom action panel with dropdown menu
- **alert/** (1 file) - Alert dialog component
- **command_palette/** (1 file) - Main container component
- **detail/** (3 files) - Detail view with metadata rendering
- **empty_state/** (1 file) - Empty state display
- **hud/** (2 files) - Heads-up display (toast-like notifications)
- **kbd/** (1 file) - Keyboard key display component
- **loading_bar/** (1 file) - Progress bar
- **quick_look/** (1 file) - Quick preview panel
- **toast/** (2 files) - Toast notification system
- **tooltip/** (1 file) - Tooltip component

#### **List & Grid Components**:
- **list/** (7 files)
  - `list.tsx` - Main list container with context
  - `list_context.tsx` - Keyboard navigation & selection state
  - `list_item/list_item.tsx` - Individual list items
  - `list_section/list_section.tsx` - Section headers
  - Tests included
  
- **grid/** (4 files)
  - `grid.tsx` - Grid container
  - `grid_context.tsx` - Grid state management
  - `grid_item/grid_item.tsx` - Grid items
  - `grid.scss` - Styling

#### **Search Components**:
- **search_bar/** (4 files)
  - `search_bar.tsx` - Main search input with breadcrumbs
  - `search_dropdown.tsx` - Filter dropdown
  - Tests included

#### **Specialized Views**:
- **clipboard_history/** (1 file) - Full-view clipboard manager
- **color_picker/** (1 file) - Full-view color picker grid
- **emoji_picker/** (1 file) - Full-view emoji search
- **file_search/** (1 file) - Full-view file search
- **settings/** (1 file) - Settings configuration view
- **snippet_manager/** (1 file) - Snippet management view

#### **Form Components**:
- **form/** (14 files including index)
  - `form.tsx` - Container
  - `form_field.tsx` - Base field wrapper
  - `form_text_field.tsx` - Text input
  - `form_password_field.tsx` - Password input
  - `form_text_area.tsx` - Text area
  - `form_checkbox.tsx` - Checkbox
  - `form_dropdown.tsx` - Dropdown/select
  - `form_date_picker.tsx` - Date picker
  - `form_file_picker.tsx` - File picker
  - `form_tag_picker.tsx` - Tag/multi-select
  - `form_separator.tsx` - Visual separator

#### **Icons System**:
- **icons/** (8 files + index)
  - `icon_shared.ts` - IconProps interface & utilities
  - `icons.tsx` - App icons (Calculator, Chat, Clipboard, CPU, Emoji, Figma, Gear, Palette, Safari, Slack, Snippets, Terminal, Vscode, Window)
  - `arrow_icons.tsx` - Directional arrows & chevrons (8 icons)
  - `control_icons.tsx` - UI control icons (Check, Circle, Dot, Ellipsis, Minus, Plus)
  - `action_icons.tsx` - Action icons (Copy, Download, Duplicate, Edit, Paste, Refresh, Trash, Upload)
  - `object_icons.tsx` - Object icons (Calendar, Clock, Document, Folder, Gear, Globe, Heart, Key, Link, Lock, Star, StarFilled)
  - `status_icons.tsx` - Status icons (Battery, Bolt, Cloud, Wifi)

---

### 8. HOOKS DIRECTORY
**Total**: 7 custom hooks

1. **use_alert.ts** - Alert dialog state management
   - `confirmAlert()` - Show confirmation dialog
   - `dismiss()` - Close alert
   - Returns: `alertState`, `confirmAlert`, `dismiss`

2. **use_favorites.ts** (1.4 KB)
   - `useFavorites()` - Favorite items persistence
   - Features: toggle, move up/down, localStorage persistence
   - Uses `storage.ts` utilities

3. **use_hud.ts** (1.8 KB)
   - HUD notifications state
   - `show()` - Display HUD with icon/title
   - Auto-dismiss capability

4. **use_keyboard_shortcut.ts** (2.8 KB)
   - Global keyboard shortcut binding
   - Supports: key, meta, shift, alt, ctrl
   - Optional: enabled flag, debounce

5. **use_navigation.ts** (4.1 KB)
   - Navigation stack with breadcrumbs
   - `push()` - Add level to stack
   - `pop()` - Go back
   - Tracks direction (push/pop), stack depth, current entry
   - Context provider: `NavigationContextProvider`

6. **use_theme.ts** (2 KB)
   - Theme persistence (light/dark/system)
   - Applies `data-theme` attribute to HTML root
   - Syncs with localStorage

7. **use_toast.ts** (1.8 KB)
   - Toast notification management
   - Multiple concurrent toasts
   - Auto-dismiss with duration

---

### 9. UTILITIES DIRECTORY
**Total**: 4 utility files

1. **storage.ts** (1.4 KB) - localStorage wrapper with type validation
   - `storageGet<T>(key, validate)` - Type-safe retrieval
   - `storageSet<T>(key, value)` - Type-safe storage
   - `storageRemove(key)` - Removal
   - **Type validators**: `isStringArray`, `isString`, `isRecord`, `isBooleanRecord`
   - Prefixes keys with `raycast-`

2. **calculator.ts** (6.7 KB) - Mathematical expression evaluator
   - Supports: +, -, *, /, %, parentheses
   - Percentage calculations
   - Safe evaluation (no eval())

3. **format_date.ts** (1.4 KB) - Date formatting
   - Relative dates: "now", "1m ago", "2h ago", etc.
   - Absolute dates: "Mon, Jan 15"

4. **format_file_size.ts** (0.4 KB) - Human-readable file sizes
   - B, KB, MB, GB, TB

---

### 10. DATA DIRECTORY
**Total**: 6 data files

1. **emoji_data.ts** (27.9 KB) - Large emoji database
   - Categories: People, Nature, Food, Travel, Activities, Objects, Symbols
   - Search optimized

2. **color_data.ts** (1.6 KB) - Color palette
   - Categories: warm, cool, neutral
   - HEX values with names

3. **clipboard_data.ts** (3.7 KB) - Mock clipboard history
   - Sample clipboard entries with timestamps

4. **snippet_data.ts** (6.4 KB) - Code snippet templates
   - Language-specific snippets (JavaScript, Python, React, etc.)

5. **file_search_data.tsx** (10 KB) - Mock file system
   - Directory tree with file names
   - Custom `FileSearchCommandIcon` component

6. **settings_data.tsx** (6.8 KB) - Settings form configuration
   - Theme, appearance, behavior settings
   - Form field definitions

---

### 11. CONSTANTS DIRECTORY
**Total**: 1 file

- **tag_colors.ts** - TagColor type and hex values
  - Colors: blue (#007aff), green (#30d158), orange (#ff9f0a), red (#ff453a), purple (#bf5af2), yellow (#ffd60a)

---

### 12. STYLES DIRECTORY
**Total**: 2 SCSS files

1. **_tokens.scss** - Design system variables
   - **Typography**: Font families (Inter), sizes (11px-28px), weights (400/500/600)
   - **Spacing**: 8 scales (2px-32px)
   - **Radii**: 5 scales (4px-999px)
   - **Dimensions**: Command palette (750px), search bar (56px), list item (40px), action panel (40px)
   - **Z-indices**: tooltip (90) → alert (200)
   - **Transitions**: fast (80ms), normal (150ms), slow (250ms)

2. **global.scss** - Global styles
   - CSS variables for light/dark themes
   - Base typography, colors, animations

### 14. KEY ARCHITECTURAL PATTERNS

**Command Registry Pattern**: 
- Centralized command registration system
- Supports full-view and detail-based commands
- Searchable by title, subtitle, keywords, aliases
- Sections for organization (Suggestions, Commands, Applications)

**State Management**:
- React hooks (useState, useContext, useCallback, useMemo)
- localStorage for persistence (theme, favorites)
- Context for navigation stack and list selection

**Component Composition**:
- Small, focused components (one responsibility)
- Shared styling via SCSS variables
- Compound components (List + ListSection + ListItem)

**Keyboard Navigation**:
- Global shortcuts via `use_keyboard_shortcut`
- Escape to close panels
- Arrow keys for list navigation
- Enter/Return to select

---

This is a professionally structured, fully-typed React 19 + Vite + TypeScript project with comprehensive component architecture, sophisticated state management, and pixel-perfect Raycast UI implementation.
